subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou hast indeed created souls from the very essence of being, who have believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and whose hearts have overflowed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد خلقت نفوسا من جواهر الوجود فامنوا بک و بایاتک و طفحت قلوبهم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God
